calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN FOR PLAINTIFF 155 TURK STREET, ASSOCIATES, L.P., WITH RICHARD REHL, PROPERTY MANAGER
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY RUDY BALDERAMA FOR DEFENDANT MARCIE WILLIAMS

THIS CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT AS NOTED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS ARE HELD. CASE SETTLED. COUNSEL PUT TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD:
THIS AGREEMENT IS IN REFERENCE TO THE PROPERTY LOCATED AT 155 TURK STREET, #405, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102. DEFENDANT AGREES TO ENTER INTO A STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF FUTURE JUDGMENT AND TENANCY AT THE PREMISES AND ALL SUB TENANCIES SHALL BE SHALL BE TERMINATED SHOULD DEFENDANT BREACH ANY TERM OF THE AGREEMENT. EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS. EACH PARTY SPECIFICALLY WAIVE ANY CLAIM OR CAUSE OF ACTION AGAINST THE OTHER PARTY. COURT TO RETAIN JURISDICTION FOR IMPLEMENTATION OF THE TERMS OF AGREEMENT. PARTIES WAIVE THE PROVISIONS OF SECTION 1542 OF THE CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL OF THE ACTION ON SEPTEMBER 29,2006 IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH THE TERMS. ANY PERSONAL POSSESSIONS OR OTHER PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AT THE PREMISES WILL BE CONSIDERED REFUSE AND OF NO VALUE. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN 24 HOURS THE SUM OF $1,000.00 IN CASH OR CERTIFIED FUNDS. DEFENDANT SHALL ALSO PAY TO PLAINTIFF FROM AN OUTSIDE SOURCE THE SUM OF $3,000.00 NO LATER THAN JANUARY 18, 2006 FOR PAYMENT OF RENT UP TO MAY 10,2006 AT WHICH TIME DEFENDANT WILL BE REQUIRED TO PAY THE BALANCE OF RENT DUE FOR MAY IN THE AMOUNT OF $358.00. DEFENDANT IS BOUND TO THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT UP TO AND INCLUDING SEPTEMEBER 29, 2006. DEFENDANT SHALL ABIDE BY THE ORIGINAL CONTRACT TERMS. PLAINTIFF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL WITHIN THREE DAYS OF THE TERMINATION DATE SHOULD DEFENDANT REMAINS IN COMPLIACE WITH THE TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM CHEN; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; REPORTER JOANN BRYCE (218)
